set_fields.description: Ralph-owned controller and child sessions should run with the concrete execution contract pinned in loop state instead of inheriting whatever tools, model, or thinking Pi currently has selected.
set_fields.design: Add a Ralph contract applier used at session_start, before_agent_start, and child-session creation boundaries. When a session is owned by an active Ralph loop, load the loop state, validate the contract against current Pi tool/model availability, set active tools to the pinned tool names, apply the pinned concrete model/thinking/policy ephemerally, and keep ralph_continue/ralph_finish availability driven by child ownership. If required tools or model auth are unavailable, pause or block the loop with a clear message rather than falling back.
set_fields.acceptance_criteria: Ralph child sessions receive the pinned model/thinking/tool set before the iteration prompt is delivered, controller sessions regain the Ralph contract when resumed, unavailable pinned tools or model auth fail visibly, and regression tests cover ambient Pi model/tool changes not leaking into Ralph child sessions.
